financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing really well financially, making more money and growing its business.
They are smart with their money, investing in new technology and caring for the environment while rewarding their investors.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Moderate Risk
bullets: The bank faces moderate risk because it deals with potential cyber threats and regulatory challenges.
Despite having safety measures, the bank's exposure to risky loans and changing rules keeps its risk level elevated.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment.
They also have good practices when it comes to social responsibilities.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The bank is in great financial shape with enough money to cover its needs.
It has a good plan to keep growing while making sure it can pay its debts.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company gives a clear picture of the big economic trends and their plans, but misses some specific goals.
They talk well about sustainability and resilience, but need to share more about their competition and future plans.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank has a clear plan and is focusing on important areas like digital technology and sustainability, which are popular worldwide.
They are doing well in the market and have strong partnerships, but changes in rules or global events could affect their growth.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: SBI is doing well financially and is making smart moves to grow, like focusing on digital banking.
There are some risks from global issues, but SBI's strong management and partnerships make it a good choice to buy.
